subject: Fermi  trigger No 645857659: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, E. Gorbovskoy, V.Kornilov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, F.Balakin, 
V.Vladimirov, D. Vlasenko, I.Gorbunov, D.Zimnukhov, V.Senik, T.Pogrosheva,

(Irkutsk State University, API),

(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich, Yu. Sergienko 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)




MASTER-OAFA robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Argentina (OAFA observatory of San Juan National University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB210620.20 (trigger No 645857659,19h 12m 12.00s , +45d 37m 48.0s, R=6.45) errorbox  253 sec after notice time and 297 sec after trigger time at 2021-06-20 04:59:11 UT, with upper limit up to  17.6 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 76 deg. The sun  altitude  is -80.9 deg. 

MASTER-IAC robotic telescope  located in Spain (IAC Teide Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB210620.20 errorbox  299 sec after notice time and 343 sec after trigger time at 2021-06-20 04:59:57 UT, with upper limit up to  18.8 mag. Observations started at twilight.  The observations began at zenith distance = 35 deg. The sun  altitude  is -13.4 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = 15 deg., longitude l = 77 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1640801

We obtain a following upper limits.
